---
title: "Methrix"
output: html_document
params:
    methrix_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/EMseq_NewData/h5_raw/
---

```{r}
library(methrix)
```


```{r}
print(params)
```


## Read in Methrix object from shared disk
```{r}
meth <- methrix::load_HDF5_methrix(params$methrix_dir)
```


## Create Methrix report
```{r}
#methrix::methrix_report(meth=meth_object, output_dir = 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/Methrix/')
```


## Remove uncovered loci

```{r}
meth <- methrix::remove_uncovered(m = meth)
#to remove the sex chromosomes, if you want. 
meth <- methrix::subset_methrix(meth, contigs = paste0("chr", 1:22))
```

## QC filtering 
```{r}
# this sets the values to missing for sites with low and too high coverage 

meth <- methrix::mask_methrix(m = meth, low_count = 5)
#this filters the sites which are not covered in s certain percentage of your study population - i.e. remove sites with are not covered in more than 20% or your samples
meth <- methrix::coverage_filter(m=meth, cov_thr = 1, prop_samples = 0.2)
```

## Filter CpG overlappings with SNP

```{r}
#while this can't hurt, these are cell lines, so don't have SNP variations. 
library(MafDb.1Kgenomes.phase3.GRCh38)
library(GenomicScores)
meth <- methrix::remove_snps(m = meth)
```

```{r}
dir.create('Z:/data/iPSC_data/EMseq_NewData/Methrix/')
save_HDF5_methrix(meth, 'Z:/data/iPSC_data/EMseq_NewData/Methrix/h5_QC_SNP_filtered/', replace=T)
```
